title: Password Strength Meter

statement.markdown:
text: Create a password strength meter using JavaScript, HTML, and Tailwind CSS. The meter should display the strength of a given password and provide feedback in the following categories:

### Requirements

1. The password strength meter should display a password strength bar with four colors: 'red' (weak), 'yellow' (fair), 'green' (good), and 'blue' (strong).
2. The meter should provide feedback on the password length, requiring a minimum of 8 characters.
3. The meter should check for at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.
4. The meter should check for at least one special character.
5. The meter should display a message indicating the strength of the password.
6. The meter should update in real-time as the user types in the password field.
format: markdown

constraints: The code should be written in JavaScript.
The code should use Tailwind CSS for styling.
The code should update in real-time as the user types in the password field.
The code should display the password strength bar with four colors.

starterCode.html:
Password Strength Meter

js: // Your JavaScript code here

gradingCriteria.description: Password must be at least 8 characters long
Password must have at least one uppercase letter
Password must have at least one lowercase letter
Password must have at least one digit
Password must have at least one special character
